audienceSections.normal: In breakfast in Ana’s kitchen, you will use [[grammar:Hay + N]]. Use [[grammar:Hay]] to say something exists or is present. En la cocina hay una mesa means there is a table in the kitchen. Hay does not change for one or many things, so do not make it plural.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter presents [[grammar:Hay + N]] in breakfast in Ana’s kitchen. Invariant existential hay introduces an indefinite noun phrase. A fronted locative phrase sets the spatial frame without changing the existential predicate.

audienceSections.normal: Use [[grammar:Hay]] to say something exists or is present. En la cocina hay una mesa means there is a table in the kitchen. Hay does not change for one or many things, so do not make it plural.
audienceSections.expert: Invariant existential hay introduces an indefinite noun phrase. A fronted locative phrase sets the spatial frame without changing the existential predicate.

audienceSections.normal: Read the Spanish punctuation with the sentence: ¿ starts a question and ¡ starts an exclamation. Learn nouns with el or la when an article is shown.
audienceSections.expert: The reading uses broadly intelligible contemporary Spanish with tú as neutral informal singular address. Null subjects and article-bearing citation forms are analyzed only where attested.

breakdown.normal:
Read each exact spanish line, then check its natural English meaning. Watch for [[grammar:Hay + N]] where it appears.

- La casa está tranquila por la mañana. — The house is quiet in the morning.
- Hay una cocina pequeña. — There is a small kitchen.
- En la cocina hay una mesa. — There is a table in the kitchen.
- Sobre la mesa hay un libro. — There is a book on the table.
- También hay una silla. — There is also a chair.
- Ana bebe un vaso de agua. — Ana drinks a glass of water.
breakdown.expert:
These exact reading lines provide the distributional evidence for [[grammar:Hay + N]]. The grammar section above analyzes the relevant morphology and syntax.

- La casa está tranquila por la mañana. — The house is quiet in the morning.
- Hay una cocina pequeña. — There is a small kitchen.
